Job.title: Job
Job.description: A job listing posted by a business.

LiaisonApplication.title: Police Liaison Application
LiaisonApplication.description: An application from a user to become a police liaison for a community.

stationName.description: The name of the applicant's police station.

stationAddress.description: The address of the police station.

stationPhoneNumber.description: The public phone number for the station.

referenceName.description: The name of a professional reference at the station.

referenceTitle.description: The title or rank of the reference.

nominatedBy.description: The UID of the user who nominated this applicant, if applicable.

nomineeEmail.description: The email of an external nominee who has been invited.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a platform user, including their core profile, roles, and permissions.

role.description: The user's primary role for default navigation.

broadcastDisplayName.description: The preferred name to display on announcements for users with broadcast access.

accountType.description: The original account type chosen at signup.

communityId.description: The community the user is currently viewing.

communityName.description: The name of the community the user is currently viewing.

memberOf.description: An array of community IDs the user is a member of.

permissions.description: A map of boolean flags for user permissions.

communityRoles.description: A map where keys are community IDs and values define the user's role in that community.

ownedBusinessIds.description: An array of business IDs that the user owns.

favouriteBusinesses.description: An array of business IDs that the user has favourited.

termsAcceptedAt.description: Timestamp of when the user accepted the terms and cookie policy.

financialTermsAcceptedAt.description: Timestamp of when the user accepted the financial terms.

hasSeenWelcome.description: Indicates if the user has seen the initial welcome dialog.

Poll.title: Poll
Poll.description: A community poll with questions and options.

PlatformOverview.title: Platform Overview
PlatformOverview.description: Contains content for the platform overview page.

AudioTour.title: AudioTour
AudioTour.description: Stores audio briefing content for the admin audio hub.

title.description: The title of the audio tab.

text.description: The script content to be converted to speech.

voice.description: The selected voice for the audio.

Post.title: Post
Post.description: A single post within a community feed.

authorId.description: The ID of the user who created the post.

communityId.description: The ID of the community this post belongs to.

likedBy.description: A list of user IDs who have liked the post.

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: A single comment on a post.

Role.title: Role
Role.description: Defines a set of permissions for a user, stored as custom claims.

isCommunityCreator.description: Allows creating communities and managing content in leaderless communities.

canViewAllCommunityReports.description: Allows a user to view all reports in a community, not just crime-related ones.

viewableReportCategories.description: List of specific community report categories the user is allowed to view.

Community.title: Community
Community.description: Represents a community's core listing information.

profileId.description: ID of the corresponding document in /community_profiles

memberCount.description: Denormalized count of members in the community.

leaderCount.description: Denormalized count of leaders in the community.

stripeAccountId.description: The Stripe Connect account ID for this community's payouts.

revenueShare.description: The revenue share percentage (e.g., 40 for 40%) for this community.

CommunityProfile.title: CommunityProfile
CommunityProfile.description: Stores the extensive profile and configuration data for a single community.

headline.description: A short, catchy headline for the community.

introduction.description: An introductory text about the community.

mainContent.description: The main, detailed content for the community's page, potentially HTML.

bannerImage.description: URL for the community's main banner image.

imageOne.description: URL for an additional promotional image.

imageTwo.description: URL for a second additional promotional image.

area.description: The geographic area the community covers (e.g., in sq miles).

mapEmbedCode.description: HTML embed code for a map view.

population.description: The population count of the community.

yearEstablished.description: The year the community was established.

communityInformation.description: A list of key community contacts and their roles (e.g., President, Secretary).

showLeadershipOnAboutPage.description: Controls the visibility of the leadership section on the public about page.

usefulInformation.description: A list of useful contacts for the community (e.g., hospitals, dentists).

MeetingMinute.title: Meeting Minute
MeetingMinute.description: A single entry for meeting minutes, including title, date, and content.

Business.title: Business
Business.description: Represents a business profile on the platform.

ownerId.description: The ID of the user who owns the business.

businessName.description: The public name of the business.

pageTwoContent.description: An array of content blocks for page two, each with text and an image.

pageThreeContent.description: The custom HTML content for the business's third page, if pageThreeType is 'custom'.

pageThreeType.description: Determines the content type for page three.

pageThreeTypeLocked.description: If true, the page three content type cannot be changed by the business owner after approval.

meetingMinutes.description: A list of meeting minutes, used if pageThreeType is 'minutes'.

showPageTwo.description: Controls visibility of the second page on the profile.

showPageThree.description: Controls visibility of the third page on the profile.

additionalCommunities.description: Array of additional community IDs where this business advertises.

gallery.description: A gallery of images associated with the business.

stripeAccountId.description: The Stripe Connect account ID for this business.

storefrontSubscription.description: Indicates if the business has an active storefront subscription.

isFreeListing.description: Indicates if this business has been granted a free community-sponsored listing for a year.

freeListingExpiresAt.description: The date when the free listing period ends.

metaTitle.description: SEO title for the business profile page.

DayHours.title: DayHours
DayHours.description: Opening hours for a single day, including a lunch break.

AccessRequest.title: AccessRequest
AccessRequest.description: Represents an application for special access, like the emergency broadcast system.

displayName.description: The public-facing name for announcements (e.g., 'National Weather Service').

Report.title: Report
Report.description: Represents a user-submitted report to either community leaders or platform administrators.

Location.title: Location
Location.description: Represents a geographic location like a country, state, or region.

parent.description: Reference to the parent location document ID (e.g., a state's parent is a country).

StorefrontPlan.title: StorefrontPlan
StorefrontPlan.description: Pricing plan for the storefront add-on for businesses.

GalleryImage.title: GalleryImage
GalleryImage.description: A single image in a gallery, with its URL and storage path.

url.description: The public URL of the image.

path.description: The full path to the image in Cloud Storage.

description.description: A short description of the image for internal reference or alt text.

FaqItem.title: FaqItem
FaqItem.description: A single frequently asked question item for a community.

Charity.title: Charity
Charity.description: Represents a local charity or non-profit organization.

metaTitle.description: SEO title for the charity page.

AuditLogEntry.title: AuditLogEntry
AuditLogEntry.description: A record of a significant action taken by an administrator.

DeletedUserLog.title: Deleted User Log
DeletedUserLog.description: A log entry for a user account that has been deleted.

userId.description: The UID of the deleted user.

WhatsonItem.title: WhatsonItem
WhatsonItem.description: Represents a permanent venue or attraction.

metaTitle.description: SEO title for the item page.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product sold by a business on their storefront.

videoUrl.description: An optional URL to a YouTube video for the product.

metaTitle.description: SEO title for the product page.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer order from a business storefront.

businessOwnerId.description: The UID of the user who owns the business.

MarketingCampaign.title: MarketingCampaign
MarketingCampaign.description: Stores generated marketing copy for various campaigns.

LegalDocument.title: LegalDocument
LegalDocument.description: Represents a legal document like Terms of Service or Privacy Policy.

content.description: The full HTML content of the document.

MarketplaceItem.title: MarketplaceItem
MarketplaceItem.description: An item listed by a community member for sale, swap, or giveaway.

definition.description: Stores job listings from businesses.

params.name: jobId
params.description: Unique identifier for the job listing.

Stores posts for a specific community feed.

Stores user-generated listings for the community marketplace.

params.name: itemId
params.description: The ID of the marketplace item.

Stores gallery images for a specific user (e.g., national advertiser).

params.description: The ID of the gallery image.

definition.description: Stores applications for special system access.

params.description: Unique identifier for the access request.

definition.description: Stores business profile data.
Stores products for a specific business storefront.

Pricing for local businesses.
Pricing for the business storefront add-on.

definition.description: Stores listings for local charities and non-profits.

params.name: charityId
params.description: The unique identifier for the charity.

definition.description: Stores community event data.

params.name: eventId
params.description: The unique identifier for the event.

definition.description: Stores 'What's On' items like permanent venues and attractions.

params.name: itemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the item.

params.name: logId
params.description: The unique ID for the log entry.

definition.description: Stores reports submitted by users to their community leaders.
Stores reports submitted by users directly to platform administrators.
Stores generated marketing campaigns.
Stores all legal documents for the platform.
Logs information about deleted user accounts for auditing and legal purposes.

firestore.reasoning: Authorization is managed via a permissions object on the main user document to support multiple roles. To improve scalability, detailed community information is stored in a separate `/community_profiles/{communityId}` collection, linked from the main `/communities/{communityId}` document. This keeps the primary `communities` collection lean for efficient querying. User-specific data is keyed by UID to simplify security rules. Pricing plans are stored in a single collection with fixed document IDs for easy retrieval. Community-specific data like FAQs, Feedback, and Charities are stored in subcollections under the parent community document or in their own top-level collections for platform-wide access.
